critique_note: fadeElement targets elem_0019 by guessed id without verification; risks fading the wrong anchor. Also adds a new text fragment ('what stayed') in the final-tableau act that the plan said should 'stop opening new threads.'
critique_suggestion: Use semantic_label-based fade if available, or fade the back-at-window/breath-on-glass anchors named in retire_at. Skip the new text — the existing testimony fragments already carry the closing voice.
